title: tutorials: describe how to use podman in updates-testing
body: @vorburger was asking in https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1973#issuecomment-454989393 about Bodhi. Add some explanation about this to our documentation.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
@ktdreyer can you sign your commit please?   `git commit --amend -s` then repush?

Test name | Commit | Details | Rerun command

[Full PR test history](https://openshift-gce-devel.appspot.com/pr/containers_libpod/2218). [Your PR dashboard](https://openshift-gce-devel.appspot.com/pr/ktdreyer). Please help us cut down on flakes by [linking to](https://github.com/kubernetes/community/blob/master/contributors/devel/flaky-tests.md#filing-issues-for-flaky-tests) an [open issue](https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues?q=is:issue+is:open) when you hit one in your PR.
